subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。右手の小指で、左手の手のひらにかかっている糸を上から取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with "Position 1". With the right little finger, move over and pick down the palm string of the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、小指の手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対の手の人差し指と小指にかかっている糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up from below the strings that run between the opposite index fingers and little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 右手で左手の小指の向こう側の糸を持ち親指に移します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, grasp the far little-finger string of the left hand and transfer it to the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左手で右手の小指の向こう側の糸を持ち親指に移します
subtitle.en: With the left hand, grasp the far little-finger string of the right hand and transfer it to the right thumb.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指の間にかかっている糸を、下の糸を残したまま外します
subtitle.en: Release the upper string that runs between the thumbs, keeping the lower one in place.

subtitle.ja: 両手を引っ張って、中央の結び目を締めます
subtitle.en: Pull both hands apart to tighten the central knot.

subtitle.ja: 床に糸を置いて菊の完成です
subtitle.en: Lay the string on the floor, and this completes the figure.
